target:
I'm unable to answer the phone right now.
After the dial tone,
please state your name and reason.

(Out? That old man. Living without a mobile phone?
What's next?)

(『The Funeral Site of the Late Kofune Ushio』…
There's a funeral today?)

11:45 AM.
Arrived at the funeral home.

Well, you're looking good!
How many years has it been?!
Hizuru-chan!

What have you been up to since then?
I've been worried…

(…The shadow doesn't affect me.
This person isn't a shadow)

Kofune Ushio… Could it be…
The Western Food Kofune…?!

…Yes.
Yesterday… there was a sea accident…
Did someone tell you about Shio?

Huh! Then why are you on the island?
You're not back for good, are you?

Wait a second!
Let me guess!

Hizuru-chan, you were always smart.
You must be a teacher or a lawyer,
or maybe a doctor?
I can't stand you!! And I still can't!!

Do you recognize this person?
You'll be shocked.
Actually…

No way! I'm so happy!
I never thought I'd meet you again…
If you want, you can see Shio's face…

! Mio told me…
Excuse me for a moment.

(When I was in second year of middle school,
I was a regular at Western Food Kofune)

(Alan had two daughters.
Shio and Mio…)
(I heard Alan's wife died shortly after giving birth to Mio)
(During Alan's work hours, the customers took care of the children…)

What a mess!
She just fell!

Shinpei went to pick up someone and fell into the sea…
He'll be late.

…Then wait a minute!
If Shinpei-kun doesn't come, it's a problem!
That… the one who said "Shinpei" was…

Ah… Hizuru left the island already,
so I don't know.

He's my friend's son,
Ajiro Shinpei.
I took him in.

About ten years ago.
His parents died in a boat accident…

Shinpei-kun had no one else,
so Alan took him in.

Ah right! Shinpei's in Tokyo too!
He's attending a cooking school--

(The boy who sat in front of me on the ferry…
He must be Ajiro Shinpei!!)

(I checked by stepping on the shadow,
but he was human at that time)

(But I can't be sure he's still human!
I can't meet him now!
Not yet!!)

(The mysterious woman who lured me to the island…
I can't trust anyone now,
not even the truth of that message or the speaker)

(Luckily, no one has noticed my true identity.
I need to act before it's too late--)

Yes…
Shio's… neck…
There are marks like she was strangled…

Wait, Alan!!
Are the police that stupid?

They're cremating the body
without even investigating yesterday's events?!

…No…
Dr. Hishigata said it was drowning…

(…Dr. Hishigata.
The only doctor on this island)

He told me.
It was Sou's son, the nurse.
He tried to resuscitate Shio…

At that time, he saw…
Scratch marks on her neck…

The victim's fingernails
often have the perpetrator's blood or skin fragments.
Have you checked Shio's nails?

…Hey.
Don't you think it's similar?
14 years ago when Ryunosuke died…

Hey!!
What are you doing?!
Opening the coffin, you crazy?!

What?!
I'll teach you a lesson!!

(The body of Shio… at first glance,
there was no abnormality…
But…)

Ah… Ah…
It was the nurse at Hishigata Clinic,
Kanago-san…

Wait!! !
Alan-san, this H-cup…
No, this woman, are you acquainted?!

Who is she?!
Please introduce her to me!!

I'm not an H-cup.
…I'm a G-cup!!

What are you doing opening the coffin?!
That's desecrating the dead!!

No, Dr. Hishigata!!
That girl is my friend--
(When excited, my vocabulary becomes weak… that's a bad habit… I need to fix it…)
You caused a commotion. I'll take my leave.

I'm sorry…
I said something weird… forget it.

target: No, I'm not Isonaka anymore. I married and became Kobayakawa.
Honestly, I wanted to invite you to the wedding.

Hizuru… I don't know your address or phone number…
Are you okay?

It depends on what "okay" means…
My heart is still beating.
Haha, you haven't changed at all.
At yesterday's wake, everyone was talking about how I used to change her diapers…

Shio… my daughter… saved her…
She's gone!!

Asako…
Shio remained Shio until the end. It's best that Shiori is safe.

(What am I crying for?
This person…)

(Your feet…
The main body is twisted unnaturally to avoid my fingertips.)

(Saved the daughter?
Shio was the savior!?
I can't forgive…!!!)

(In Asako's form…
How many insults to Alan and Shio are you planning!!)
